title: Public Hearing Decision in the case of David Norris
body: "The Vice Chair of the Parole Board has granted the application for David Norris’ parole hearing to be made public. More information about the reasons for this decision are attached.  The oral hearing has now been listed for 7, 8 and 10 October 2025, where the 7 and 8 October hearings will be public.  To register to attend this hearing, please email public.hearings@paroleboard.gov.uk for a registration form.  For more detail on applying for a parole hearing to be made public, please read more here: Applying for a Parole review to be public - GOV.UK (www.gov.uk)  "
